realPerBookQc.note: cover + page batches only (excludes forced-error probe)

issues: UNINTENDED_RENDERED_TEXT: The cover contains additional rendered words (e.g. “TIPTOE!”) besides the painted title. Any non-title lettering on the cover (other than the very small logo mark) caps overall quality at 4.
EXTRA_LOGO: A small logo/text mark (“Storywink.ai”) is present. (Small logo marks are allowed, but list here for clarity.)

MINOR_SCALE/PLACEMENT: Pets are well-rendered and recognizable, but one pet (the long-snouted crocodilian) sits lower in the composition and appears a touch larger relative to the child than in the provided turnaround reference — this is minor and does not break recognizability.
result.suggestedPromptAdditions: 1) REMOVE ALL NON-TITLE LETTERING: Remove the word/word-bubble “TIPTOE!” (and any other extraneous words) from the illustration. No sound-words, captions, or scene-type text should be painted onto the cover image itself. 2) TITLE ACCURACY: Keep the painted title exactly as: “Kai and the Wild Rumble” (no extra words, subtitles, or stray text lines). 3) LOGO: If a small logo mark is required, make it tiny and unobtrusive at the corner; do NOT add additional words or taglines. 4) PET SCALE ADJUSTMENT (minor): Adjust the long-snouted crocodilian so its eye/headline and overall height match the exact proportions from its reference turnaround (slightly raise the body or reduce width so the height ratio to the child matches the sheet). 5) STYLE/CONSTRUCTION NOTE (optional): Maintain the handcrafted collage + paper + gouache tactile look used in the references: keep sampled colors exactly, soft paper halo vignettes behind each character, and subtle deckled-paper shadow layers beneath feet. This will ensure final imagery is fully consistent with the reference sheets.

pages.textSnippet: Kai stands at the garden gate with a paper map in his hand. Trapjaw holds the lantern. Godzilla snif

issues: RENDERED_TEXT: the sound word "TIPTOE!" appears in the illustration (lettering/onomatopoeia present).
OVERALL_QUALITY_CAPPED_BY_RENDERED_TEXT: any interior lettering is disallowed and forces a quality cap.
Minor: none of the canonical characters appear to have major deviations vs the reference sheets.
result.suggestedPromptAdditions: REMOVE ALL LETTERING: remove the rendered sound word 'TIPTOE!' from the artwork. KEEP CHARACTER DETAILS EXACT: Trapjaw must keep the red helmet, green face tone, blue body, metal prosthetic arm and leather belt exactly matched to the reference sheet (sample colors from the sheet). Kai must keep the black hair, warm golden skin tone, orange/white striped outfit and child head-to-body proportions exactly as in the reference. Godzilla must keep the large black body, purple dorsal plates and red chest markings exactly as on the reference. Grypho must keep its small pet scale/feather shapes and colors exactly. PROP: Trapjaw should be shown holding the lantern in his hand (as in the script) — ensure the lantern is visually in Trapjaw’s right hand and not floating or held by another character. BACKGROUND: keep the same warm vignette and paper texture as the rest of the book. Remove any stray marks that look like letters or glyphs.

pages.textSnippet: The gate creaks open—eee-eee! The garden grows tall and green, like a jungle made of big wet leaves.

issues: RENDERED_TEXT: the sound words 'DRIP! DRIP!' are present in the illustration (lettering/onomatopoeia).
OVERALL_QUALITY_CAPPED_BY_RENDERED_TEXT.
result.suggestedPromptAdditions: REMOVE ALL LETTERING: remove the rendered onomatopoeia 'DRIP! DRIP!' (or any other sound words) from the artwork. ACTION NOTE: show Kai touching a large leaf and a single water drop falling — no text. CHARACTER DETAILS: sample Kai’s skin and hair color exactly from the Kai reference (black hair, warm golden skin). Trapjaw: keep exact helmet red, green face color and metal arm. Godzilla and Grypho: keep scale/fur colors and proportions exactly as on their sheets. STYLE: maintain the handcrafted collage + gouache look (paper-edge layers, subtle deckled edges, soft gouache washes).

result.suggestedPromptAdditions: REMOVE ALL LETTERING: remove the rendered 'SNIFF SNIFF' (or any sniff/noise text) from this page. ACTION / PROP: depict Godzilla discovering a long silver scale under a fern (scale may lie on the ground near Godzilla’s snout) — do NOT add any text labels pointing at the scale. If Godzilla holds the scale, show it in Godzilla’s mouth or paw; otherwise leave it on the ground near the fern. CHARACTER DETAILS: ensure Trapjaw is kneeling and smiling, with his metal shoulder/arm and red-helmeted head matching the Trapjaw reference exactly (sample colors). Kai should look on with the correct child proportions, hair, and outfit per the Kai reference. STYLE: keep collage/paper layers and gouache washes consistent with the rest of the book.
